name: Mexicalli Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ketchup and chopped green chilies; set aside in a small bowl.
2. Beat eggs, water, salt, and pepper together with a fork until well blended.
3. Heat butter in a 10-inch skillet until sizzling and lightly browned.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet all at once.
5. Cook slowly, stirring occasionally by running a spatula around the edges to lift the uncooked portion and allow it to flow underneath.
6. When the mixture is set, fold the omelet in half.
7. Cut into pie-shaped wedges.
8. Top each serving with 2 tablespoons of the ketchup-chili mixture.
9. Makes 3 servings.
